news.title: Mathematical modeling maps out solutions for placing drug collection boxes
news.summary_en: A plastic bottle of prescribed painkillers—extras from a surgical recuperation—lurks in the back of your medicine cabinet. If you’re like most Americans, you’ll either let the pills linger, flush them down the toilet or toss…
